jurisdiction_name: RIPLEY UNION LEWIS HUNT LOCAL SD (BROWN)
narrative:
Ripley Union Lewis Hunt Local Sd (Brown) school district has 4,162 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
